plugins.name: writing-hugo-blog
plugins.description: Create Hugo blog posts in Chinese with proper front matter, formatting, and AI content labeling.

plugins.name: agent-design
plugins.description: Guidelines for designing tools and action spaces for AI agents. Covers progressive disclosure, tool design patterns, and lessons from Claude Code development.

plugins.name: redis-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive Redis design patterns, best practices, and command references. Includes caching, messaging, coordination patterns, and MCP integration for live queries.

plugins.name: llm-doc
plugins.description: Documentation standards for AI coding agents: AGENTS.md format for project context and conventional commit messages for clear git history.

plugins.name: adk-go
plugins.description: Build production-grade AI agents with Google's Agent Development Kit (ADK) for Go. Skills for agent creation, tool development, multi-agent patterns, and callbacks.
